content:
# Session 46 ‚Äî summary

## NO PROVER LANE ‚Äî terminal closeout (10th consecutive)
- `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{type: summary, no_prover_lane: true, iter: 46}`. `prover.jsonl` empty.
  `sync_leanok` iter=46 sha=`9aca7ca` +0/‚àí0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9`;
  `git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty ‚áí no `.lean` edit since iter-036, no regression possible.
- No closable in-cone sorry exists. Re-confirmed via `grep -rn sorry`:
  - `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` is a COMMENT ("‚Ä¶no proof exists without `sorryAx`"), NOT a typed sorry ‚Äî
    file is SORRY-FREE.
  - `QuotScheme.lean` holds the 4 typed œá skeletons (L126/165/201/228) ‚Äî all cohomology/Snapper-gated,
    out-of-leg.
  - `RelativeSpec.lean` holds typed sorries ‚Äî out-of-cone.
- No-dispatch is the mechanically correct call. Options re-weighed and declined exactly as iters 037‚Äì045:
  re-probe œá (genuinely cohomology/Snapper-gated, no Mathlib scheme cohomology at pinned commit);
  open the cohomology megaleg (overreach ‚Äî critic-validated H‚Å∞ scope, not USER-opened);
  split the done 4k-line file (busywork; split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems);
  name/repoint anonymous pins (net-negative ‚Äî manufactures merge conflicts the reconciliation must undo).

## Leg state ‚Äî DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi` + B1‚ÄìB7 assoc + ‚àÄL `GSemiring` + invertible-L
`GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. `SectionGradedRing.lean` SORRY-FREE. No live frontier.

## Blueprint doctor ‚Äî out-of-cone, do NOT edit (merge-time)
`logs/iter-046/blueprint-doctor.md`: dormant inherited chapters only ‚Äî
`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange` (2 phantom covers for non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 13 broken
`\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). No prover
near them ‚áí phantom covers misroute nothing. Single-commit extraction artifacts; resolve at merge per
Archon memory.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` file modified this iter (`git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty); prior verdict
  (iter-036) had no live must-fix. Both skip conditions met.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` files received prover work this iter (no prover edits to verify).
- progress-critic / strategy-critic / blueprint-reviewer: plan-phase subagents; route closed iter-036,
  STRATEGY.md unchanged (prior SOUND), HARD GATE moot (no dispatch).
